ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved: Issue with Authentication Flow
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the authentication bug reported in ticket #12345 has been fixed and merged into the main branch.

- Updated the login API to handle token refresh correctly.
- Added unit tests for edge cases.
- Deployed to staging; please test the changes.

If you encounter any further issues, let me know.

Thanks,
Maria Lopez
DevOps Engineer

spam.subject: URGENT: Scheduled Team Meeting – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hi Team,

This is an official reminder that a mandatory Zoom meeting has been scheduled for 3:00 PM EST tomorrow. Please join using the link below. Failure to attend will result in a review of your project status.

Link: <URL>

If you cannot attend, contact me immediately.

Best,
Alex Johnson
Senior Manager, Operations
